titles.title: Keep Me Jesus as the Apple of Thine Eye

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Keep me Jesus as the Apple of thine eye, Hide me under the shadow of thy wings, Keep thy hand upon me lest I die, Keep me Jesus as the Apple of thine eye.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Glory Glory Hallelujah, Praise the Lord, Glory Glory Hallelujah, Praise the Lord, Glory Glory Hallelujah, Praise the Lord, Praise the Lord Hallelujah, Praise the Lord.
